"'''Walking the Path That's Given'''" is a story from ''[[Star Wars Tales 21]]'' and collected in ''[[Star Wars Tales Volume 6]]''. It was going to be the first part in a serial, in the manner of "[[Nomad]]," but ''[[Star Wars Tales]]'' was canceled after only the first part.

==Plot summary==
[[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]] recruits ex-[[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|CIS]] [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] ace [[Nas Ghent]] to create the [[Black Eight Squadron]], an elite [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] squadron.

{{Plot|comic}}
